API docs by Redocly

Zevaro Gateway API (0.1.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

URL: https://zevaro.ai License: Apache-2.0

Zevaro is a desktop-first, open-source AI gateway for individual developers and small teams. It runs as a single native application on macOS, Windows, and Linux, exposing both an OpenAI-compatible and an Anthropic-compatible wire-protocol surface on localhost, alongside a management API used by the GUI and power-user CLI tooling. All keys, prompts, history, routing rules, and policies live on the user's machine in a SQLite database. Nothing phones home.

OpenAI-Compatible

Drop-in replacement for api.openai.com. Point any OpenAI-SDK-compatible client at http://127.0.0.1:39237 with any API key value. Zevaro routes requests to the configured providers transparently.

Create a chat completion

Creates a model response for the given chat conversation. Supports both non-streaming (application/json) and streaming (text/event-stream via SSE) response modes, selected by the stream field in the request body. When streaming, each chunk is delivered as a data: <json> SSE line. The stream is terminated by the special data: [DONE] line (not JSON).

Request Body schema: application/json
required
model
required
string

Model identifier. Zevaro uses this to look up the appropriate provider via routing rules.

required
Array of objects

Conversation messages in OpenAI chat format.

stream
boolean or null

When true, the response is streamed as Server-Sent Events (SSE). When false or absent, the response is returned as a single JSON object.

temperature
number or null

Sampling temperature between 0 and 2. Higher values make output more random.

max_tokens
integer or null

Maximum number of tokens to generate.

top_p
number or null

Nucleus sampling: consider only the top-p probability mass.

n
integer or null

Number of completions to generate. Defaults to 1.

null or string or Array of strings

Stop sequences. Generation stops when any of these sequences is produced.

presence_penalty
number or null

Presence penalty between -2 and 2.

frequency_penalty
number or null

Frequency penalty between -2 and 2.

object or null

Token logit bias map.

user
string or null

A unique identifier representing the end user. Used for abuse detection.

Array of objects or null (OpenAIToolDefinition)

Tools (functions) the model may call.

null or string or object

Controls which tool the model calls. 'none', 'auto', or a specific tool.

object or null

Response format specification.

seed
integer or null

Random seed for deterministic sampling.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/v1/chat/completions

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "model": "string",
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "role": "system",
      • "content": "string",
      • "tool_call_id": "string",
      • "tool_calls": [
        • {
          • "id": "string",
          • "type": "function",
          • "function": {
            • "name": "string",
            • "arguments": "string"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "stream": true,
  • "temperature": 0,
  • "max_tokens": 0,
  • "top_p": 0,
  • "n": 0,
  • "stop": { },
  • "presence_penalty": 0,
  • "frequency_penalty": 0,
  • "logit_bias": {
    • "property1": 0,
    • "property2": 0
    },
  • "user": "string",
  • "tools": [
    • {
      • "type": "function",
      • "function": {
        • "name": "string",
        • "description": "string",
        • "parameters": { },
        • "strict": true
        }
      }
    ],
  • "tool_choice": { },
  • "response_format": {
    • "type": "text"
    },
  • "seed": 0
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 429
  • 500
  • 503
Content type
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "object": "chat.completion",
  • "created": 0,
  • "model": "string",
  • "choices": [
    • {
      • "index": 0,
      • "message": {
        • "role": "assistant",
        • "content": "string",
        • "tool_calls": [
          • {
            • "id": "string",
            • "type": "function",
            • "function": {
              • "name": "string",
              • "arguments": "string"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
      • "finish_reason": "stop"
      }
    ],
  • "usage": {
    • "prompt_tokens": 0,
    • "completion_tokens": 0,
    • "total_tokens": 0
    },
  • "system_fingerprint": "string"
}

Create a text completion (legacy)

Legacy text completion endpoint for single-turn prompt→completion pairs. Retained for compatibility with clients that use the older non-chat API. Prefer /v1/chat/completions for new integrations.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
model
required
string

Model identifier.

required
string or (Array of strings or Array of integers)

The prompt to complete. A string, array of strings, token array, or array of token arrays.

max_tokens
integer or null

Maximum number of tokens to generate.

temperature
number or null

Sampling temperature between 0 and 2.

top_p
number or null

Nucleus sampling probability.

n
integer or null

Number of completions to generate. Defaults to 1.

stream
boolean or null

Whether to stream the response.

null or string or Array of strings

Stop sequences.

presence_penalty
number or null

Presence penalty between -2 and 2.

frequency_penalty
number or null

Frequency penalty between -2 and 2.

user
string or null

End-user identifier.

suffix
string or null

The suffix that comes after a completion of inserted text.

logprobs
integer or null

Include log probabilities on the logprobs most likely tokens.

echo
boolean or null

Echo the prompt in addition to the completion.

best_of
integer or null

Generates best_of completions server-side and returns the best.

seed
integer or null

Random seed for deterministic sampling.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/v1/completions

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "model": "string",
  • "prompt": "string",
  • "max_tokens": 0,
  • "temperature": 0,
  • "top_p": 0,
  • "n": 0,
  • "stream": true,
  • "stop": { },
  • "presence_penalty": 0,
  • "frequency_penalty": 0,
  • "user": "string",
  • "suffix": "string",
  • "logprobs": 0,
  • "echo": true,
  • "best_of": 0,
  • "seed": 0
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 429
  • 500
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "object": "text_completion",
  • "created": 0,
  • "model": "string",
  • "choices": [
    • {
      • "text": "string",
      • "index": 0,
      • "finish_reason": "stop",
      • "logprobs": { }
      }
    ],
  • "usage": {
    • "prompt_tokens": 0,
    • "completion_tokens": 0,
    • "total_tokens": 0
    }
}

Create embeddings

Creates an embedding vector representing the input text. Routed to whichever provider supports the embeddings capability for the requested model.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
model
required
string

Embedding model identifier.

required
string or (Array of strings or Array of integers)

Text(s) to embed. Either a single string or an array of strings or token arrays.

encoding_format
string or null
Enum: "float" "base64" null

The format of the returned embeddings. Defaults to 'float'.

dimensions
integer or null

Number of dimensions for the output embedding (supported by some models).

user
string or null

A unique identifier representing the end user.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/v1/embeddings

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "model": "string",
  • "input": "string",
  • "encoding_format": "float",
  • "dimensions": 0,
  • "user": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 429
  • 500
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "embedding",
      • "index": 0,
      • "embedding": [
        • 0
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "model": "string",
  • "usage": {
    • "prompt_tokens": 0,
    • "total_tokens": 0
    }
}

List available models

Lists all models currently available through the Zevaro routing engine — the union of models from all enabled, healthy providers. Each model entry includes capability flags so clients can filter by what they need.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/v1/models

Response samples

  • 200
  • 500
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "object": "model",
      • "created": 0,
      • "owned_by": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Create an image

Generates one or more images from a text prompt. Routed to whichever provider supports the images capability (e.g. DALL-E via OpenAI, Imagen via Google).

Request Body schema: application/json
required
prompt
required
string

Text description of the desired image.

model
string or null

Image generation model identifier (e.g. 'dall-e-3', 'dall-e-2').

n
integer or null

Number of images to generate. Defaults to 1.

quality
string or null
Enum: "standard" "hd" null

Image quality. 'hd' creates finer detail (dall-e-3 only).

response_format
string or null
Enum: "url" "b64_json" null

Format in which the image is returned. Defaults to 'url'.

size
string or null
Enum: "256x256" "512x512" "1024x1024" "1792x1024" "1024x1792" null

Size of the generated image.

style
string or null
Enum: "vivid" "natural" null

Style of the generated image (dall-e-3 only).

user
string or null

A unique identifier representing the end user.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/v1/images/generations

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "prompt": "string",
  • "model": "string",
  • "n": 0,
  • "quality": "standard",
  • "response_format": "url",
  • "size": "256x256",
  • "style": "vivid",
  • "user": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 429
  • 500
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "created": 0,
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "url": "string",
      • "b64_json": "string",
      • "revised_prompt": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Transcribe audio

Transcribes audio into text. The request uses multipart/form-data encoding because the audio file is uploaded as a binary part. Routed to whichever provider supports the audio_transcription capability (e.g. Whisper via OpenAI).

Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
file
required
string <binary>

The audio file to transcribe. Supported formats: flac, mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, ogg, wav, webm.

model
required
string

Model identifier (e.g. 'whisper-1').

language
string or null

Language of the audio in ISO-639-1 format. Providing this improves accuracy.

prompt
string or null

Optional text to guide the model's transcription style or continue a prior segment.

response_format
string or null
Enum: "json" "text" "srt" "verbose_json" "vtt" null

Format of the transcription output. Defaults to 'json'.

temperature
number or null

Sampling temperature between 0 and 1.

timestamp_granularities
Array of strings or null
Enum: "word" "segment"

Timestamp granularities to include. Requires response_format 'verbose_json'.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/v1/audio/transcriptions

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 429
  • 500
  • 503
Content type
{
  • "text": "string",
  • "task": "string",
  • "language": "string",
  • "duration": 0,
  • "words": [
    • {
      • "word": "string",
      • "start": 0,
      • "end": 0
      }
    ],
  • "segments": [
    • {
      • "id": 0,
      • "start": 0,
      • "end": 0,
      • "text": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Anthropic-Compatible

Drop-in replacement for api.anthropic.com. Point any Anthropic-SDK-compatible client at http://127.0.0.1:39237. The anthropic-version header is required and validated.

Create a message (Anthropic-compatible)

Creates an AI model response for the given conversation in Anthropic's Messages API format. Supports both non-streaming (application/json) and streaming (text/event-stream via SSE) response modes, selected by the stream field. The anthropic-version header is required and validated against supported versions. When streaming, the response uses Anthropic's event-based SSE protocol with typed events (message_start, content_block_start, content_block_delta, content_block_stop, message_delta, message_stop).

header Parameters
anthropic-version
required
string
Value: "2023-06-01"

The version of the Anthropic Messages API to use. Zevaro validates this header against the set of supported versions.

anthropic-beta
string

Optional beta feature flags (e.g. 'tools-2024-04-04', 'computer-use-2024-10-22'). Multiple values may be separated by commas.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
model
required
string

The model identifier (e.g. "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022").

max_tokens
required
integer

Maximum number of output tokens to generate.

required
Array of objects

Conversation messages.

system
string or null

System prompt.

stream
boolean or null

When true, the response is streamed as SSE.

Array of objects or null

Tools the model may use.

object or null

Tool choice control.

temperature
number or null

Sampling temperature between 0 and 1.

top_p
number or null

Nucleus sampling probability.

top_k
integer or null

Top-k sampling.

stop_sequences
Array of strings or null

Stop sequences.

object or null

Optional request metadata.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/v1/messages

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "model": "string",
  • "max_tokens": 0,
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "role": "user",
      • "content": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "system": "string",
  • "stream": true,
  • "tools": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "input_schema": { }
      }
    ],
  • "tool_choice": {
    • "type": "auto",
    • "name": "string"
    },
  • "temperature": 0,
  • "top_p": 0,
  • "top_k": 0,
  • "stop_sequences": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "metadata": {
    • "user_id": "string"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 429
  • 500
  • 503
Content type
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "type": "message",
  • "role": "assistant",
  • "content": [
    • {
      • "type": "text",
      • "text": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "input": { }
      }
    ],
  • "model": "string",
  • "stop_reason": "end_turn",
  • "stop_sequence": "string",
  • "usage": {
    • "input_tokens": 0,
    • "output_tokens": 0
    }
}

Count tokens for a message (Anthropic-compatible)

Counts the number of tokens that would be consumed by sending the given message request, without actually generating a response. Useful for pre-flight cost estimation and context-window management.

header Parameters
anthropic-version
required
string
Value: "2023-06-01"

The Anthropic API version to use for token counting.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
model
required
string

The model identifier (e.g. "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022").

max_tokens
required
integer

Maximum number of output tokens to generate.

required
Array of objects

Conversation messages.

system
string or null

System prompt.

stream
boolean or null

When true, the response is streamed as SSE.

Array of objects or null

Tools the model may use.

object or null

Tool choice control.

temperature
number or null

Sampling temperature between 0 and 1.

top_p
number or null

Nucleus sampling probability.

top_k
integer or null

Top-k sampling.

stop_sequences
Array of strings or null

Stop sequences.

object or null

Optional request metadata.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/v1/messages/count_tokens

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "model": "string",
  • "max_tokens": 0,
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "role": "user",
      • "content": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "system": "string",
  • "stream": true,
  • "tools": [
    • {
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "input_schema": { }
      }
    ],
  • "tool_choice": {
    • "type": "auto",
    • "name": "string"
    },
  • "temperature": 0,
  • "top_p": 0,
  • "top_k": 0,
  • "stop_sequences": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "metadata": {
    • "user_id": "string"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 429
  • 500
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "input_tokens": 0
}

Management

GUI-facing and CLI-facing management API. Requires a LocalBearer token generated on first launch and stored in the OS keychain. Used to configure providers, routes, policies, budgets, and to query history and spend analytics.

Daemon liveness check

Returns 200 OK when the daemon is running and its subsystems (database, routing engine) are operational. Returns 503 when the daemon is starting up or a critical subsystem is unavailable. Used by the GUI, the auto-update mechanism, and external health probes.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/healthz

Response samples

  • 200
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "ok",
  • "version": "string"
}

List registered providers

Returns all registered provider instances (cloud, local, and free-tier), including their health status and capability flags.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/providers

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "providers": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "provider_id": "anthropic",
      • "display_name": "string",
      • "base_url": "string",
      • "enabled": true,
      • "capabilities": [
        • "chat"
        ],
      • "unstable": true,
      • "health_status": "healthy",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Register a new provider

Registers a new provider instance. The API key (if required) must be submitted separately via a secure key-storage endpoint and is never accepted in this request body.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
provider_id
required
string
Enum: "anthropic" "openai" "xai" "google" "deepseek" "mistral" "groq" "together" "cohere" "ollama" "lmstudio" "llamacpp" "vllm" "bigpickle"

The canonical provider type identifier.

display_name
required
string

User-assigned display name.

base_url
string or null

Override base URL. Required for local providers.

enabled
boolean

Whether to enable this provider immediately. Defaults to true.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/providers

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "provider_id": "anthropic",
  • "display_name": "string",
  • "base_url": "string",
  • "enabled": true
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "provider_id": "anthropic",
  • "display_name": "string",
  • "base_url": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "capabilities": [
    • "chat"
    ],
  • "unstable": true,
  • "health_status": "healthy",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Get a provider

Returns a single registered provider by its UUID.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Provider registration UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/providers/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "provider_id": "anthropic",
  • "display_name": "string",
  • "base_url": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "capabilities": [
    • "chat"
    ],
  • "unstable": true,
  • "health_status": "healthy",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Update a provider

Partially updates a registered provider (e.g. toggle enabled, update display_name, change base_url). Only fields present in the request body are updated.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Provider registration UUID.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
display_name
string or null

New display name.

base_url
string or null

New base URL override.

enabled
boolean or null

Whether to enable or disable this provider.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/providers/{id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "display_name": "string",
  • "base_url": "string",
  • "enabled": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "provider_id": "anthropic",
  • "display_name": "string",
  • "base_url": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "capabilities": [
    • "chat"
    ],
  • "unstable": true,
  • "health_status": "healthy",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Delete a provider

Removes a registered provider. Any routing rules or policies referencing this provider will have their target set to null. Historical request records are retained.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Provider registration UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/providers/{id}

Response samples

  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "message": "string",
  • "details": { }
}

Test provider connectivity

Sends a minimal liveness request to the provider and returns the health result. Updates the provider's health_status in the database. Does not charge the user (uses the cheapest available model with a single-token prompt).

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Provider registration UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/providers/{id}/test

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "healthy",
  • "latency_ms": 0,
  • "error": "string"
}

List all known models (management)

Returns all models known to Zevaro across all registered providers, including capability flags, pricing data, and context window sizes. Unlike /v1/models (the OpenAI-compatible surface), this endpoint returns the full Model schema with Zevaro-specific metadata.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
query Parameters
provider_id
string <uuid>

Filter models by provider registration UUID.

capability
string
Enum: "chat" "embeddings" "images" "streaming" "tools" "vision" "audio_transcription"

Filter models by capability flag.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/models

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "models": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
      • "model_id": "string",
      • "display_name": "string",
      • "capabilities": [
        • "chat"
        ],
      • "context_window": 0,
      • "max_output_tokens": 0,
      • "input_cost_per_million": 0,
      • "output_cost_per_million": 0
      }
    ]
}

List routing rules

Returns all user-defined routing rules in priority order (lowest priority number first).

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/routes

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "routes": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "enabled": true,
      • "strategy": "manual",
      • "priority": 0,
      • "predicates": [
        • {
          • "field": "string",
          • "operator": "equals",
          • "value": "string"
          }
        ],
      • "target_provider_id": "58a07898-2487-40d9-adaa-3b37559a7219",
      • "target_model_id": "string",
      • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
      • "skip_cache": true,
      • "skip_redaction": true,
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Create a routing rule

Creates a new routing rule.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string <uuid>

Surrogate key.

name
required
string

User-assigned name for the routing rule.

description
string or null

Optional description of when and why this rule fires.

enabled
required
boolean

Whether this rule participates in routing decisions.

strategy
required
string
Enum: "manual" "project" "tag" "rule" "auto" "default"

The routing strategy this rule implements: manual — pinned provider/model override; project — triggered by filesystem-path project context; tag — triggered by session tags; rule — predicate-based rule (content regex, header values, model name, etc.); auto — cost-aware learned routing; default — the user's default policy fallback.

priority
required
integer

Evaluation order. Lower numbers are evaluated first.

Array of objects or null

Predicate conditions. All must match for the rule to fire (AND semantics).

target_provider_id
string or null <uuid>

Target provider registration ID. Null means use any capable provider.

target_model_id
string or null

Target model identifier string. Null means use any model from the target provider.

policy_bundle_id
string or null <uuid>

Policy bundle to apply when this rule fires. Null inherits the session/project policy.

skip_cache
boolean

When true, bypass the semantic cache for requests matching this rule.

skip_redaction
boolean

When true, skip PII redaction for requests matching this rule (requires explicit trust grant).

created_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 creation timestamp.

updated_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 last-modification timestamp.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/routes

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "strategy": "manual",
  • "priority": 0,
  • "predicates": [
    • {
      • "field": "string",
      • "operator": "equals",
      • "value": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "target_provider_id": "58a07898-2487-40d9-adaa-3b37559a7219",
  • "target_model_id": "string",
  • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
  • "skip_cache": true,
  • "skip_redaction": true,
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "strategy": "manual",
  • "priority": 0,
  • "predicates": [
    • {
      • "field": "string",
      • "operator": "equals",
      • "value": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "target_provider_id": "58a07898-2487-40d9-adaa-3b37559a7219",
  • "target_model_id": "string",
  • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
  • "skip_cache": true,
  • "skip_redaction": true,
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Get a routing rule

Returns a single routing rule by UUID.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Routing rule UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/routes/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "strategy": "manual",
  • "priority": 0,
  • "predicates": [
    • {
      • "field": "string",
      • "operator": "equals",
      • "value": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "target_provider_id": "58a07898-2487-40d9-adaa-3b37559a7219",

  • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
  • "skip_cache": true,
  • "skip_redaction": true,
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Update a routing rule

Partially updates a routing rule. Only fields present in the request body are updated.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Routing rule UUID.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string <uuid>

Surrogate key.

name
required
string

User-assigned name for the routing rule.

description
string or null

Optional description of when and why this rule fires.

enabled
required
boolean

Whether this rule participates in routing decisions.

strategy
required
string
Enum: "manual" "project" "tag" "rule" "auto" "default"

The routing strategy this rule implements: manual — pinned provider/model override; project — triggered by filesystem-path project context; tag — triggered by session tags; rule — predicate-based rule (content regex, header values, model name, etc.); auto — cost-aware learned routing; default — the user's default policy fallback.

priority
required
integer

Evaluation order. Lower numbers are evaluated first.

Array of objects or null

Predicate conditions. All must match for the rule to fire (AND semantics).

target_provider_id
string or null <uuid>

Target provider registration ID. Null means use any capable provider.

target_model_id
string or null

Target model identifier string. Null means use any model from the target provider.

policy_bundle_id
string or null <uuid>

Policy bundle to apply when this rule fires. Null inherits the session/project policy.

skip_cache
boolean

When true, bypass the semantic cache for requests matching this rule.

skip_redaction
boolean

When true, skip PII redaction for requests matching this rule (requires explicit trust grant).

created_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 creation timestamp.

updated_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 last-modification timestamp.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/routes/{id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "strategy": "manual",
  • "priority": 0,
  • "predicates": [
    • {
      • "field": "string",
      • "operator": "equals",

      }
    ],

}

LocalBearer
path Parameters
id

List policy bundles

Returns all policy bundles — both built-in and user-defined.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/policies

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "policies": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "builtin": true,
      • "preferred_providers": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "preferred_models": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "cache_enabled": true,
      • "redaction_enabled": true,
      • "local_only": true,
      • "free_tier_only": true,
      • "tags": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Create a policy bundle

Creates a new user-defined policy bundle.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string <uuid>

Surrogate key.

name
required
string

Display name of the policy bundle.

description
string or null

Human-readable description of the policy bundle's intent.

builtin
required
boolean

True for built-in bundles (Cheap Coding, Privacy First, etc.). Built-in bundles are immutable.

preferred_providers
Array of strings or null

Ordered list of preferred provider IDs. Routing engine prefers these when all else is equal.

preferred_models
Array of strings or null

Ordered list of preferred model identifiers.

cache_enabled
boolean

Whether semantic prompt caching is enabled for requests under this policy.

redaction_enabled
boolean

Whether PII redaction is applied before dispatching to cloud providers.

local_only
boolean

When true, only local providers (Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, vLLM) are eligible.

free_tier_only
boolean

When true, only free-tier providers are eligible.

tags
Array of strings or null

Session tags that automatically activate this policy bundle.

created_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 creation timestamp.

updated_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 last-modification timestamp.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/policies

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "builtin": true,
  • "preferred_providers": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "preferred_models": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "cache_enabled": true,
  • "redaction_enabled": true,
  • "local_only": true,
  • "free_tier_only": true,
  • "tags": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "builtin": true,
  • "preferred_providers": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "preferred_models": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "cache_enabled": true,
  • "redaction_enabled": true,
  • "local_only": true,
  • "free_tier_only": true,
  • "tags": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Returns a single policy bundle by UUID.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

  • "description": "string",

    • "string"

  • "preferred_models": [
    • "string"

  • "cache_enabled": true,
  • "redaction_enabled": true,
  • "local_only": true,

  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Update a policy bundle

Partially updates a user-defined policy bundle. Built-in bundles cannot be modified and will return 400.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Policy bundle UUID.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string <uuid>

Surrogate key.

name
required
string

Display name of the policy bundle.

description
string or null

Human-readable description of the policy bundle's intent.

builtin
required
boolean

True for built-in bundles (Cheap Coding, Privacy First, etc.). Built-in bundles are immutable.

preferred_providers
Array of strings or null

Ordered list of preferred provider IDs. Routing engine prefers these when all else is equal.

preferred_models
Array of strings or null

Ordered list of preferred model identifiers.

cache_enabled
boolean

Whether semantic prompt caching is enabled for requests under this policy.

redaction_enabled
boolean

Whether PII redaction is applied before dispatching to cloud providers.

local_only
boolean

When true, only local providers (Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, vLLM) are eligible.

free_tier_only
boolean

When true, only free-tier providers are eligible.

tags
Array of strings or null

Session tags that automatically activate this policy bundle.

created_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 creation timestamp.

updated_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 last-modification timestamp.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/policies/{id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "builtin": true,
  • "preferred_providers": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "preferred_models": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "cache_enabled": true,
  • "redaction_enabled": true,
  • "local_only": true,
  • "free_tier_only": true,
  • "tags": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json

  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "builtin": true,

    • "string"
    ],

    ],

  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Delete a policy bundle

Deletes a user-defined policy bundle. Built-in bundles cannot be deleted. Routes and sessions referencing this policy will have their policy_bundle_id set to null.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Policy bundle UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/policies/{id}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "message": "string",
  • "details": { }
}

List projects

Returns all configured per-filesystem-path project configurations.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/projects

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "projects": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "path": "string",
      • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
      • "description": "string",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Create a project

Creates a new per-filesystem-path project configuration.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string <uuid>

Surrogate key.

name
required
string

User-assigned project name.

path
required
string

Absolute filesystem path (or glob pattern) that identifies this project.

policy_bundle_id
string or null <uuid>

Policy bundle applied when a request matches this project path.

description
string or null

Optional project description.

created_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 creation timestamp.

updated_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 last-modification timestamp.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/projects

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "path": "string",
  • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
  • "description": "string",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",

  • "path": "string",
  • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
  • "description": "string",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Delete a project

Deletes a project configuration. Historical request records remain intact.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Project UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/projects/{id}

  • 404

application/json

  • "code": "string",
  • "message": "string",
  • "details": { }
}

List sessions

Returns all sessions, ordered by most recently updated.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
query Parameters
limit
integer

Maximum number of sessions to return. Defaults to 50.

offset
integer

Number of sessions to skip for pagination.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/sessions

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "sessions": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "label": "string",
      • "tags": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
      • "pinned_provider_id": "dec84cf7-87c5-41f3-bbf1-b7b7a0362224",
      • "pinned_model_id": "string",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 0
}

Create a session

Creates a new session with optional tags and policy binding.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string <uuid>

Surrogate key.

label
string or null

Optional user-assigned label for this session.

tags
Array of strings or null

Session tags used for tag-based routing.

policy_bundle_id
string or null <uuid>

Policy bundle applied to requests in this session.

pinned_provider_id
string or null <uuid>

Pinned provider (manual override). Null means no pinning.

pinned_model_id
string or null

Pinned model identifier (manual override). Null means no pinning.

created_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 creation timestamp.

updated_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 last-modification timestamp.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/sessions

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "label": "string",
  • "tags": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
  • "pinned_provider_id": "dec84cf7-87c5-41f3-bbf1-b7b7a0362224",
  • "pinned_model_id": "string",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "label": "string",
  • "tags": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
  • "pinned_provider_id": "dec84cf7-87c5-41f3-bbf1-b7b7a0362224",
  • "pinned_model_id": "string",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Get a session

Returns a single session by UUID.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Session UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/sessions/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "label": "string",
  • "tags": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",

  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Update a session

Partially updates a session (e.g. add tags, change policy binding, pin a model).

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Session UUID.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string <uuid>

Surrogate key.

label
string or null

Optional user-assigned label for this session.

tags
Array of strings or null

Session tags used for tag-based routing.

policy_bundle_id
string or null <uuid>

Policy bundle applied to requests in this session.

pinned_provider_id
string or null <uuid>

Pinned provider (manual override). Null means no pinning.

pinned_model_id
string or null

Pinned model identifier (manual override). Null means no pinning.

created_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 creation timestamp.

updated_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 last-modification timestamp.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/sessions/{id}

  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"

Delete a session

Deletes a session. Historical request records in this session are retained.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Session UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/sessions/{id}

Response samples

  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "message": "string",
  • "details": { }
}

List prompt history

Returns paginated prompt history with full-text search and filter support. FTS queries use SQLite FTS5 syntax (AND, OR, NOT, phrase, prefix^).

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
query Parameters
q
string

Full-text search query (FTS5 syntax). Searches prompt content.

model
string

Filter by model identifier string.

from
string <date-time>

Filter requests created at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

to
string <date-time>

Filter requests created at or before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

project_id
string <uuid>

Filter by project UUID.

cost_min
number

Filter requests with cost_usd >= this value.

cost_max
number

Filter requests with cost_usd <= this value.

outcome
string
Enum: "success" "error" "rate_limited" "cancelled" "cache_hit"

Filter by request outcome.

tag
string

Filter by session tag (exact match).

limit
integer

Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 50, max 200.

offset
integer

Number of results to skip for pagination.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/history

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "entries": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "session_id": "1ffd059c-17ea-40a8-8aef-70fd0307db82",
      • "project_id": "405d8375-3514-403b-8c43-83ae74cfe0e9",
      • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
      • "model_id": "string",
      • "input_tokens": 0,
      • "output_tokens": 0,
      • "cost_usd": 0.1,
      • "latency_ms": 0,
      • "cache_hit": true,
      • "routing_strategy": "manual",
      • "tags": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "outcome": "success",
      • "prompt_snippet": "string",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 0
}

Get a history entry

Returns a single history entry by UUID.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

History entry UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/history/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "session_id": "1ffd059c-17ea-40a8-8aef-70fd0307db82",
  • "project_id": "405d8375-3514-403b-8c43-83ae74cfe0e9",
  • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
  • "model_id": "string",
  • "input_tokens": 0,
  • "output_tokens": 0,
  • "cost_usd": 0.1,
  • "latency_ms": 0,
  • "cache_hit": true,
  • "routing_strategy": "manual",
  • "tags": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "outcome": "success",
  • "prompt_snippet": "string",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Get spend aggregates

Returns aggregated spend data grouped by the specified dimension over the specified time window. All dimensions (provider, model, project, session, tag) are supported. Time windows: day, week, month, all-time.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
query Parameters
group_by
string
Enum: "provider" "model" "project" "session" "tag"

Grouping dimension for the aggregation. Defaults to 'provider'.

window
string
Enum: "day" "week" "month" "all"

Time window for the aggregation. Defaults to 'month'.

from
string <date-time>

Start of the aggregation window (ISO 8601). Overrides the window parameter.

to
string <date-time>

End of the aggregation window (ISO 8601). Overrides the window parameter.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/spend

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "dimension": "provider",
  • "window": "day",
  • "from": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "to": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "entries": [
    • {
      • "key": "string",
      • "display_name": "string",
      • "total_cost_usd": 0.1,
      • "request_count": 0,
      • "input_tokens": 0,
      • "output_tokens": 0,
      • "cache_savings_usd": 0
      }
    ]
}

Get spend projection

Returns the current 30-day spend projection based on a 14-day rolling window with linear regression, including a 90% confidence interval. Updated after every request.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/spend/projection

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "projected_monthly_usd": 0.1,
  • "confidence_interval_low_usd": 0.1,
  • "confidence_interval_high_usd": 0.1,
  • "based_on_days": 0,
  • "computed_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

List budgets

Returns all budget definitions with their current spend.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/budgets

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "budgets": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "limit_usd": 0.1,
      • "window": "day",
      • "mode": "soft_warning",
      • "scope": "global",
      • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
      • "project_id": "405d8375-3514-403b-8c43-83ae74cfe0e9",
      • "current_spend_usd": 0.1,
      • "alert_at_percent": 0,
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Create a budget

Creates a new budget definition.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string <uuid>

Surrogate key.

name
required
string

User-assigned name for this budget.

limit_usd
required
number <double>

Maximum spend in USD before the threshold mode triggers.

window
required
string
Enum: "day" "week" "month"

The time window over which the budget is measured and reset.

mode
required
string
Enum: "soft_warning" "hard_cutoff"

Enforcement mode: soft_warning — alert the user when the budget is exceeded but continue routing; hard_cutoff — reject requests with a 429 error when the budget is exceeded.

scope
string
Enum: "global" "provider" "project"

The scope of this budget. Global applies to all spend. Provider and project scope it to a specific entity.

provider_id
string or null <uuid>

Provider this budget applies to. Null unless scope is 'provider'.

project_id
string or null <uuid>

Project this budget applies to. Null unless scope is 'project'.

current_spend_usd
required
number <double>

Current spend in USD within the active window.

alert_at_percent
integer or null

Optional alert threshold as a percentage of the limit (e.g. 80 = alert at 80% of the limit).

created_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 creation timestamp.

updated_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 last-modification timestamp.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/budgets

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "limit_usd": 0.1,
  • "window": "day",
  • "mode": "soft_warning",
  • "scope": "global",
  • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
  • "project_id": "405d8375-3514-403b-8c43-83ae74cfe0e9",
  • "current_spend_usd": 0.1,
  • "alert_at_percent": 0,
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "limit_usd": 0.1,
  • "window": "day",
  • "mode": "soft_warning",
  • "scope": "global",
  • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
  • "project_id": "405d8375-3514-403b-8c43-83ae74cfe0e9",
  • "current_spend_usd": 0.1,
  • "alert_at_percent": 0,
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Get a budget

Returns a single budget by UUID.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Budget UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/budgets/{id}

  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "limit_usd": 0.1,
  • "window": "day",
  • "mode": "soft_warning",
  • "scope": "global",
  • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
  • "project_id": "405d8375-3514-403b-8c43-83ae74cfe0e9",
  • "current_spend_usd": 0.1,
  • "alert_at_percent": 0,
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Update a budget

Partially updates a budget definition.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Budget UUID.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string <uuid>

Surrogate key.

name
required
string

User-assigned name for this budget.

limit_usd
required
number <double>

Maximum spend in USD before the threshold mode triggers.

window
required
string
Enum: "day" "week" "month"

The time window over which the budget is measured and reset.

mode
required
string
Enum: "soft_warning" "hard_cutoff"

Enforcement mode: soft_warning — alert the user when the budget is exceeded but continue routing; hard_cutoff — reject requests with a 429 error when the budget is exceeded.

scope
string
Enum: "global" "provider" "project"

The scope of this budget. Global applies to all spend. Provider and project scope it to a specific entity.

provider_id
string or null <uuid>

Provider this budget applies to. Null unless scope is 'provider'.

project_id
string or null <uuid>

Project this budget applies to. Null unless scope is 'project'.

current_spend_usd
required
number <double>

Current spend in USD within the active window.

alert_at_percent
integer or null

Optional alert threshold as a percentage of the limit (e.g. 80 = alert at 80% of the limit).

created_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 creation timestamp.

updated_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 last-modification timestamp.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/budgets/{id}

Request samples

Content type
application/json
{

  • "name": "string",
  • "limit_usd": 0.1,
  • "window": "day",
  • "mode": "soft_warning",
  • "scope": "global",
  • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
  • "project_id": "405d8375-3514-403b-8c43-83ae74cfe0e9",
  • "current_spend_usd": 0.1,
  • "alert_at_percent": 0,

  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

  • 400

  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json

  • "name": "string",

  • "window": "day",
  • "mode": "soft_warning",
  • "scope": "global",

  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Delete a budget

Deletes a budget definition.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Budget UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/budgets/{id}

Response samples

  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "message": "string",
  • "details": { }
}

Get cache statistics

Returns current semantic prompt cache statistics including hit rate, total entries, and estimated savings.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/cache/stats

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "total_entries": 0,
  • "hit_count": 0,
  • "miss_count": 0,
  • "hit_rate": 0.1,
  • "total_savings_usd": 0.1,
  • "oldest_entry_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "last_invalidation_cause": "ttl"
}

Purge the semantic cache

Clears all entries from the semantic prompt cache. This is a destructive operation and cannot be undone. Future requests will be dispatched to providers until the cache is rebuilt.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/cache

Response samples

  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "message": "string",
  • "details": { }
}

Multi-model comparison

Dispatches a single prompt to multiple providers/models in parallel and returns all responses for side-by-side comparison. Results are stored in history with a comparison tag. Useful for evaluating model quality and cost differences.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
prompt
required
string

The prompt to send to all target models.

required
Array of objects >= 2 items

List of provider/model targets to dispatch to.

timeout_ms
integer or null

Per-target timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000.

system
string or null

Optional system prompt to include with all requests.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/compare

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "prompt": "string",
  • "targets": [
    • {
      • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
      • "model_id": "string"
      },
    • {
      • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
      • "model_id": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "timeout_ms": 0,
  • "system": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "comparison_id": "3b27d395-1e6b-479b-baa5-81329cfca144",
  • "results": [
    • {
      • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
      • "model_id": "string",
      • "success": true,
      • "response": "string",
      • "latency_ms": 0,
      • "cost_usd": 0,
      • "input_tokens": 0,
      • "output_tokens": 0,
      • "error": "string"
      }
    ]
}

List MCP servers

Returns all registered MCP server configurations and their health status.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/mcp/servers

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "servers": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "transport": "stdio",
      • "command": "string",
      • "args": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "url": "string",
      • "enabled": true,
      • "tool_count": 0,
      • "health_status": "healthy",
      • "last_health_check_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Register an MCP server

Registers a new MCP server. Zevaro will immediately attempt to connect, issue initialize and tools/list, and cache the tool descriptors.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string <uuid>

Surrogate key.

name
required
string

User-assigned name for this MCP server.

transport
required
string
Enum: "stdio" "http"

Transport type used to communicate with this MCP server.

command
string or null

For stdio transport: the command to spawn the MCP server process.

args
Array of strings or null

For stdio transport: command arguments.

url
string or null

For http transport: the URL of the MCP server.

enabled
required
boolean

Whether this MCP server is active.

tool_count
integer

Number of tools currently cached from this server.

health_status
required
string
Enum: "healthy" "degraded" "unhealthy" "unknown"

Last observed health status of this MCP server.

last_health_check_at
string or null <date-time>

ISO 8601 timestamp of the last health check.

created_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 creation timestamp.

updated_at
required
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 last-modification timestamp.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/mcp/servers

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "transport": "stdio",
  • "command": "string",
  • "args": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "url": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "tool_count": 0,
  • "health_status": "healthy",
  • "last_health_check_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "transport": "stdio",
  • "command": "string",
  • "args": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "url": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "tool_count": 0,
  • "health_status": "healthy",
  • "last_health_check_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Delete an MCP server

Removes an MCP server registration. Any cached tool descriptors are also removed. In-flight tool calls to this server will fail gracefully.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

MCP server UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/mcp/servers/{id}

Response samples

  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "message": "string",
  • "details": { }
}

List cached MCP tools

Returns all tool descriptors currently cached from all healthy, enabled MCP servers. Tools are namespaced as __.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
query Parameters
server_id
string <uuid>

Filter tools by MCP server UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/mcp/tools

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "tools": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "server_id": "820efca4-4a15-4ab7-82fc-9e76f6d61325",
      • "name": "string",
      • "namespaced_name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "input_schema": { },
      • "cached_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Export signed audit log

Exports the request audit log as Ed25519-signed JSON Lines. The export includes all requests within the specified time range. The signature can be verified with the project's public key using the Zevaro CLI. API keys, prompt content, and response content are never included in audit exports.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
optional
from
string or null <date-time>

Export records from this timestamp. Null exports all records.

to
string or null <date-time>

Export records up to this timestamp. Null exports through now.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/audit/export

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "from": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "to": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/x-ndjson
"string"

Export configuration bundle

Exports a portable configuration bundle containing routes, policies, and projects. API keys are never included. The bundle can be shared via file or git URL and imported by any Zevaro instance.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
optional
include_routes
boolean

Whether to include routing rules. Defaults to true.

include_policies
boolean

Whether to include user-defined policy bundles. Defaults to true.

include_projects
boolean

Whether to include project configurations. Defaults to true.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/sharing/export

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "include_routes": true,
  • "include_policies": true,
  • "include_projects": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "version": "string",
  • "exported_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "routes": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "enabled": true,
      • "strategy": "manual",
      • "priority": 0,
      • "predicates": [
        • {
          • "field": "string",
          • "operator": "equals",
          • "value": "string"
          }
        ],
      • "target_provider_id": "58a07898-2487-40d9-adaa-3b37559a7219",
      • "target_model_id": "string",
      • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
      • "skip_cache": true,
      • "skip_redaction": true,
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "policies": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "builtin": true,
      • "preferred_providers": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "preferred_models": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "cache_enabled": true,
      • "redaction_enabled": true,
      • "local_only": true,
      • "free_tier_only": true,
      • "tags": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "projects": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "path": "string",
      • "policy_bundle_id": "3e1355c7-2e3f-441e-8246-c037ce42077c",
      • "description": "string",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Import a configuration bundle

Imports a configuration bundle produced by /api/v1/sharing/export. Validates the bundle format before applying. Conflicts (duplicate names) are reported and can be resolved via a merge_strategy parameter.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object

The configuration bundle to import (produced by /api/v1/sharing/export).

merge_strategy
string
Enum: "skip_existing" "overwrite_existing"

How to handle conflicts with existing configurations. Defaults to 'skip_existing'.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/sharing/import

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "bundle": { },
  • "merge_strategy": "skip_existing"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "imported": 0,
  • "skipped": 0,
  • "errors": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Discover local model servers

Triggers an immediate scan for local model servers on their well-known ports (Ollama :11434, LM Studio :1234, llama.cpp :8080, vLLM :8000) and returns the discovery results. Note: the daemon also runs this scan automatically every 30 seconds in the background.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/discovery/local-models

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "discovered": [
    • {
      • "server_type": "ollama",
      • "port": 0,
      • "reachable": true,
      • "models": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "already_registered": true
      }
    ]
}

List API key health

Returns health statistics for all registered API keys across all providers. Keys are never returned in plaintext — only obfuscated aliases and health metadata are exposed.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/health/keys

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "keys": [
    • {
      • "provider_id": "fe3d49af-4061-436b-ae60-f7044f252a44",
      • "key_alias": "string",
      • "status": "healthy",
      • "success_rate": 0.1,
      • "error_rate": 0.1,
      • "last_used_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "last_failure_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "rate_limit_reset_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

List installed plugins

Returns all installed Zevaro plugins and their status.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/plugins

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "plugins": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "version": "string",
      • "capabilities": [
        • "provider"
        ],
      • "enabled": true,
      • "binary_path": "string",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Install a plugin

Installs a Zevaro plugin from a binary path or URL. The plugin manifest is validated, capability declarations are recorded, and the plugin is sandboxed via HashiCorp go-plugin subprocess RPC.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
source
required
string

Source of the plugin binary: an absolute filesystem path or a download URL.

enabled
boolean

Whether to enable the plugin immediately after installation. Defaults to true.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/plugins/install

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "source": "string",
  • "enabled": true
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "name": "string",
  • "version": "string",
  • "capabilities": [
    • "provider"
    ],
  • "enabled": true,
  • "binary_path": "string",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Uninstall a plugin

Uninstalls a plugin. The plugin process is terminated, its binary is not deleted (the user manages plugin binaries themselves), and its registration is removed from the database.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Plugin UUID.

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/plugins/{id}

Response samples

  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "message": "string",
  • "details": { }
}

Get auto-update status

Returns the current state of the auto-update mechanism, including the current version, the selected update channel, whether an update is available, and download progress if an update is being downloaded.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/updater/status

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "current_version": "string",
  • "channel": "stable",
  • "auto_check_enabled": true,
  • "last_check_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "update_available": true,
  • "latest_version": "string",
  • "release_notes_url": "string",
  • "download_progress": 0
}

Trigger an update check

Triggers an immediate check of the update manifest, bypassing the hourly automatic schedule. Returns the updater status after the check completes.

Authorizations:
LocalBearer

Responses

Local Zevaro daemon (default port)

http://127.0.0.1:39237/api/v1/updater/check

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "current_version": "string",
  • "channel": "stable",
  • "auto_check_enabled": true,
  • "last_check_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "update_available": true,
  • "latest_version": "string",
  • "release_notes_url": "string",
  • "download_progress": 0
}
